goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 08:45'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'price', 'train ID', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 08:45
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get price, train ID, and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 3
The hotel should be in the centre
